# Warranty Periods

Warranty periods vary by product line. Electronics accessories and appliances have a 12‑month manufacturer warranty from the invoice-date, while acme-basics private label products have a 24‑month warranty from the invoice-date.

[Source: warranty.md#warranty-periods]
